utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs for each component and a total monthly cost; satisfied. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs (home_contents €60/month) plus add-ons and total monthly cost; satisfied. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs (standard travel €50/month, assistance €5/day) and approximate total monthly cost; satisfied. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs? It states services included but provides no explicit costs for these enhancement services beyond being integrated; lacks explicit cost details for additional services themselves, so not fully specified as “with costs.” 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly cost breakdown, previous cost, savings, and component breakdown; satisfied. Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item named in the final coverage plan and find the exact matching option in the ground-truth ratings. Mappings found: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan; LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan; Preventive Care Package Add-on -> health_enhancement_services.Preventive Care Package; LifeFirst Standard Home Content -> property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage; Technology Protection Add-on -> property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection; Smart Home Integration Add-on -> property_enhancement_services.Smart Home Integration; LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan; 24/7 Travel Assistance Add-on -> travel_enhancement_services.24/7 Travel Assistance.
